title: Optimization might be a bug
summary: A few days ago, I came across an Instagram reel that lingered in my mind long after I scrolled past it. It suggested that people with fewer resources who cook for themselves are generally healthier than wealthier individuals who outsource their meals. I do not know if that is entirely factual, and I am certainly not romanticizing scarcity; I like financial security, the comfort it buys, and the freedom to make my own choices. If given the option, I will choose security every time. But the video did make me look closely at myself.
